summary: Colombian BIC (Bienes de Interés Cultural) company registry with cultural heritage classification, NIT, and municipality.
Colombian notary transaction data with document type, parties involved, notary office, and transaction date.
Colombian hospital surgical procedure records with procedure type, patient demographics, institution, and outcome.
Colombian sports and recreation facility inventory with facility type, municipality, capacity, and ownership.
Colombian school infrastructure data with building condition, amenities, and student-to-facility ratios.
Colombian municipal budget allocations with expenditure categories, approved amounts, and fiscal year.
Colombian disease surveillance data with reportable conditions, case counts, municipality, and epidemiological week.
Colombian property registry records with cadastral number, owner, property value, and registration date.
Colombian watershed management data with hydrological units, land use, and conservation status.
Colombian traffic accident data with location, vehicle types, injury severity, and contributing factors.
Colombian police station locations with unit type, jurisdiction, and geographic coordinates.
Colombian indigenous community registry with community name, territory, population, and department.
Colombian customs and trade data with product codes, import/export values, and trading partners.
Colombian fishing and aquaculture production data by species, region, and production method.
Colombian teacher certification and employment data with subject area, institution level, and certification status.
